texts: The crossed-out wheelie-bin symbol on your product, battery, literature, or packaging reminds you that all electrical and electronic products and batteries must be taken to separate collection at the end of their working life.
Remember to remove personal data from the device first.
Do not dispose of these products as unsorted municipal waste: take them for recycling.
For info on your nearest recycling point, check with your local waste authority, or read about HMD’s take-back program and its availability in your country at www.hmd.com/support/topics/recycle.
